files.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Test script to verify hello.py prints 'Hello, World!' to stdout."""

import subprocess
import sys

def test_hello_prints_hello_world():
    """Verify hello.py prints 'Hello, World!' to stdout."""
    result = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, 'hello.py'],
        capture_output=True,
        text=True
    )

    assert result.returncode == 0, f"Script failed with return code {result.returncode}"
    assert result.stdout.strip() == 'Hello, World!', f"Expected 'Hello, World!' but got '{result.stdout.strip()}'"
    assert result.stderr == '', f"Script should not write to stderr but got: {result.stderr}"

if __name__ == '__main__':
    test_hello_prints_hello_world()
    print("✓ All tests passed!")
